agribalyse.name_en: Turkey, leg, meat and skin, raw
agribalyse.name_fr: Dinde, cuisse, viande et peau, crue

ingredients_text: Turkey thigh meat 71%, sauce 29% [water, prune 5% (dried plum, preservative: potassium sorbate), starch, flavourings, spices, pea fibre, gluten-free wheat fibre, salt, glucose, extracts spices, gluten-free oat fiber].
ingredients_text_en: Turkey thigh meat 71%, sauce 29% [water, prune 5% (dried plum, preservative: potassium sorbate), starch, flavourings, spices, pea fibre, gluten-free wheat fibre, salt, glucose, extracts spices, gluten-free oat fiber].
ingredients_text_pl: Mięsa z uda indyka bez skóry 71%, sos ze śliwką 29% [woda, suszona śliwka 5% (suszona śliwka, substancja konserwująca: sorbinian potasu), skrobia, aromaty, przyprawy, błonnik grochowy, błonnik _pszenny_ bezglutenowy, sól, glukoza, ekstrakty przypraw, błonnik owsiany bezglutenowy].
ingredients_text_with_allergens: Turkey thigh meat 71%, sauce 29% [water, prune 5% (dried plum, preservative: potassium sorbate), starch, flavourings, spices, pea fibre, gluten-free wheat fibre, salt, glucose, extracts spices, gluten-free oat fiber].
